description:
An immutable record of something that happened.

Events reference the entity they happened to (entity_type + entity_id),
the asset where it happened, and the operator who caused or observed it.

source_system.description: Adapter or system that produced this record (e.g. 'whk-wms').
source_system.title: Source System

source_id.description: Primary key of this entity in the source system.
source_id.title: Source Id

captured_at.description: UTC timestamp when this snapshot was captured by Forge.
captured_at.title: Captured At

metadata.description: Source-system-specific fields that don't map to core schema.
metadata.title: Metadata

entity_type.description: Type of entity this event relates to (e.g. 'manufacturing_unit', 'lot').
entity_type.title: Entity Type

entity_id.description: Source ID of the entity this event relates to.
entity_id.title: Entity Id

asset_id.description: Reference to PhysicalAsset where event occurred (by source_id).
asset_id.title: Asset Id

operator_id.description: User or operator who caused/observed the event.
operator_id.title: Operator Id

event_time.description: When the event occurred in the source system.
event_time.title: Event Time

result.description: Outcome or result of the event (free text or code).
result.title: Result

work_order_id.description: Reference to associated WorkOrder if applicable.
work_order_id.title: Work Order Id

title: OperationalEvent
